info.name: 01_Leader_Auth_User_WithTests
info.description: Generated from phonehub_postman_test_cases.xlsx. One request equals one testcase; request name starts with stable testcase ID for CI/Jira deduplication.

item.name: AUTH01 - Dang ky hop le tra 200/201, co message thanh cong

request.description:
TestCaseId: AUTH01
Module: Auth/User/Health
Type: Positive
Auth: Public
Objective: Dang ky hop le tra 200/201, co message thanh cong

exec: if (pm.response.text() && contentType.includes("application/json")) { json = pm.response.json(); responseData = json.data || json; }
pm.test(`${testCaseId} no server error`, () => pm.expect(pm.response.code, pm.response.text()).to.be.below(500));
pm.test(`${testCaseId} JSON body when present`, () => { if (pm.response.text()) pm.expect(contentType).to.include("application/json"); });
const id = responseData.id || responseData.productId || responseData.orderId || responseData.addressId || responseData.cartItemId || responseData.guestCartId;
if (id && url.includes("/admin/products")) { pm.environment.set("createdProductId", id); pm.environment.set("productId", id); }
if (id && url.includes("/admin/categories")) { pm.environment.set("createdCategoryId", id); pm.environment.set("categoryId", id); }
if (id && url.includes("/admin/brands")) { pm.environment.set("createdBrandId", id); pm.environment.set("brandId", id); }
if (id && url.includes("/user/addresses")) { pm.environment.set("createdAddressId", id); pm.environment.set("addressId", id); }
if (id && url.includes("/orders")) { pm.environment.set("createdOrderId", id); pm.environment.set("orderId", id); }
if (id && url.includes("/admin/promotions")) { pm.environment.set("createdPromotionId", id); pm.environment.set("promotionId", id); }
